name: local-mr
description: Review your whole Git branch in a local MR-style browser UI before pushing.

scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test:browser
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: node test/comparison-cache-regression.mjs && node test/context-endpoint-regression.mjs && node test/read-state-regression.mjs && node test/cli-scan-regression.mjs && node test/install-regression.mjs
